home.heroText: Schedule an appointment with our friendly dentist.

expertDentists.title: Expert Dentists
expertDentists.description: Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to providing the best dental care.

modernTechnology.title: Modern Technology
modernTechnology.description: State-of-the-art equipment and techniques for optimal dental care.

easyBooking.title: Easy Booking
easyBooking.description: Simple online booking system for your convenience.

services.title: Our Dental Services
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of dental services to meet all your oral health needs. Our experienced team uses the latest technology to provide the best care possible.

cleaning.title: Teeth Cleaning
cleaning.description: Professional dental cleaning to remove plaque and tartar, preventing gum disease and maintaining oral health.

frequency.question: How often should I get a dental cleaning?
frequency.answer: Most dentists recommend getting a professional cleaning every 6 months.

pain.question: Does dental cleaning hurt?
pain.answer: The procedure is generally painless, though you may experience some sensitivity.

braces.title: Braces & Orthodontics
braces.description: Comprehensive orthodontic treatment to straighten teeth and improve your smile alignment.

types.question: What types of braces are available?
types.answer: We offer traditional metal braces, ceramic braces, and clear aligners.

duration.question: How long will I need to wear braces?
duration.answer: Treatment duration varies, typically 18-24 months depending on your case.

whitening.title: Teeth Whitening
whitening.description: Professional teeth whitening treatment to brighten your smile and remove stains.

results.question: How long do whitening results last?
results.answer: Results typically last 6-12 months with proper maintenance.

safety.question: Is teeth whitening safe?
safety.answer: Yes, when performed by a dental professional, teeth whitening is safe and effective.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.description: Permanent solution for missing teeth using titanium implants that look and feel like natural teeth.

lifespan.question: How long do dental implants last?
lifespan.answer: With proper care, dental implants can last a lifetime.

pain.question: Is the implant procedure painful?
pain.answer: The procedure is performed under anesthesia, so you won't feel pain during the process.

emergency.title: Emergency Care
emergency.description: Immediate dental care for urgent situations such as severe pain, broken teeth, or dental trauma.

what.question: What constitutes a dental emergency?
what.answer: Severe pain, broken teeth, lost fillings, or any condition causing significant discomfort.

hours.question: Do you offer after-hours emergency care?
hours.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency dental services for our patients.

services.notFound: Don't see what you're looking for? Contact us to learn more about our services.

about.title: About Our Clinic
about.mission: At Smile Bright, our mission is to provide top-quality dental care in a friendly, modern environment. We believe everyone deserves a healthy, confident smile.
about.history: Founded in 2010, our clinic has grown into a trusted dental home for families in our community. We combine years of experience with the latest technology to ensure your comfort and care.

facility.title: Modern Facility & Technology
facility.description: Our clinic features state-of-the-art equipment, digital x-rays, and a relaxing environment designed for your comfort and safety.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.dentist2Role: Orthodontist - Specialist in braces and aligners

list: Certified by the National Dental Association

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us for any questions or concerns about your dental care.

form.success: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.

resources.title: Patient Resources
resources.desc: Everything you need to know about your dental care journey with us. Download forms, learn about insurance, and find helpful dental care tips.

procedures.title: Common Procedures Explained
items: Dental Cleanings: Remove plaque and tartar for a healthy smile.
Fillings: Repair cavities and restore tooth function.
Crowns: Protect and strengthen damaged teeth.
Implants: Replace missing teeth with natural-looking results.
Braces: Align teeth and improve your bite.

hygiene.title: Oral Hygiene Tips
items: Brush twice daily with fluoride toothpaste.
Floss every day to remove plaque between teeth.
Limit sugary snacks and drinks.
Visit your dentist regularly for checkups and cleanings.
Replace your toothbrush every 3-4 months.

children.title: Children's Dental Care Guide
items: Start brushing as soon as the first tooth appears.
Use a pea-sized amount of fluoride toothpaste for children over 3.
Encourage healthy snacks like fruits and veggies.
Schedule the first dental visit by age 1.
Teach proper brushing and flossing habits early.

seniors.title: Senior Dental Care Guide
items: Maintain regular dental checkups and cleanings.
Clean dentures or dental appliances daily.
Stay hydrated to prevent dry mouth.
Watch for signs of gum disease or oral cancer.
Manage medications that may affect oral health.

emergency.title: Emergency Dental Guide
items: For a knocked-out tooth, keep it moist and see a dentist immediately.
For severe toothache, rinse with warm water and contact your dentist.
For broken braces or wires, cover sharp ends and seek dental care.
For lost fillings or crowns, use dental cement and schedule a visit.
Call your dentist or emergency number for urgent dental issues.
